name: wa-medicaid-policy
note: WA HCA Apple Health provider billing guides — single Drupal accordion index, ~60 programs, 176 dated *-bg-YYYYMMDD.pdf links inline (no sub-page hop). Direct /assets/billers-and-providers/*.pdf, curl 200, no login. NEMT is brokered (no FFS billing guide); Personal Care/HCBS lives under DSHS/ALTSA, not HCA. Lab covered inside Physician-Related guide.

docs.title: Ground Emergency Medical Transportation (GEMT) Billing Guide
Home Health (Acute Care Services) Billing Guide
Private Duty Nursing for Children Billing Guide
Physician-Related Services / Health Care Professional Billing Guide
Acute Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation Billing Guide
Medical Equipment and Supplies (DME) Billing Guide
Complex Rehabilitation Technology (CRT) Products Billing Guide
ProviderOne Billing and Resource Guide (general claims/enrollment)

_comment: All PDF hrefs are inline on the single index page (Drupal accordion). Filename pattern: <slug>-bg-<YYYYMMDD>.pdf — pick the 'to present' edition. Fee schedules (xlsx) sit alongside each guide. No standalone Laboratory billing guide (lab/path covered in Physician-Related guide). NEMT: HCA contracts regional brokers — no provider billing guide; see /billers-providers-partners/program-information-providers/transportation-services-nonemergency. Personal Care / HCBS waivers administered by DSHS ALTSA (separate agency), not on this HCA index.
